block_00: Stay on top of things with our weekly digest!
block_04: The American labor market is getting back on track with larger-than-expected payrolls gain in October. Non Farm Payrolls increased 531,000 from the projected 450,000, reducing the US unemployment rate to 4.6%. The number of initial jobless claims reached a 19-month low, decreasing from 283,000 to 269,000 in a week.
block_05: Such news might speak in favor of USD in the coming weeks. Will the US dollar end this year stronger than ever, or is it too soon to tell?

block_08: Biggest Stock Market Crashes in History
block_09: They say that history repeats itself, so learning from the past might be a good idea. We have covered 5 of the most detrimental stock market crashes in history and looked into the reasons they happened in the first place.
block_11: Trading Psychology to Tame 4 Basic Emotions and Develop a “Trading Brain”
block_12: If you want to be a brilliant trader, just learning about trading basics isn’t enough. You need to know how to manage your emotions and work on your psychology. Find out how in this extensive material.
block_15: Financial stocks of banks and payment systems are traditionally popular among both novice and professional investors like Warren Buffet. Find out which 4 stocks analysts consider promising and why.
block_17: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_43: Did you know that modern pirates have also had their stock exchange? The WSJ uncovered this fact in 2011. According to the story, the 1st pirate stock exchange appeared in 2009 in the Somalia neighbourhood. Operating 24/7, the so-called “stock market” allowed investors to profit from trading pirate goods stolen on the high seas.
